nasb.text: Then they secretly induced men to say, “We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses and against God.”

esv.text: Then they secretly instigated men who said, “We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses and God.”

cnv.text: 於是他們唆使眾人，說：“我們聽過他說謗瀆摩西和　神的話。”

ccb.text: 于是，他们暗中唆使一些人诬告司提凡说：“我们听见他说亵渎摩西和上帝的话！”

csbs.text: 于是他们暗中唆使人说：“我们听过这个人针对摩西和神说亵渎的话语。”
